expectations.text: Re-forms the content into platform-native formats rather than reposting identical text everywhere
expectations.evidence: Re-forms into platform-native formats rather than identical reposting.

expectations.text: Names a distinct native format per platform (e.g. X thread, LinkedIn carousel/post, Instagram Reel or carousel)
Gives hook guidance for at least one platform (the first line/first second)
expectations.evidence: Gives hook guidance (first line / first second).

expectations.text: Reflects platform differences (e.g. X is punchy/threaded, Instagram is visual-first, LinkedIn is professional-narrative)
Does not just say 'share the link on each platform'
expectations.evidence: Does not just say 'post the link everywhere'.
